name: AURUM Credit Card

domestic: 16 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per year, capped at 4 visits per quarter
international: Unlimited complimentary international airport lounge access with DreamFolks membership

joiningBenefits: 40,000 AURUM Reward Points worth ₹10,000 upon payment of joining fee

milestones.label: Monthly Tata CLiQ Luxury voucher worth ₹1,500 on monthly spends of ₹1 lakh
Tata CLiQ Luxury voucher worth ₹5,000 on annual spends of ₹5 lakh
Taj experience voucher worth ₹10,000 on annual spends of ₹10 lakh
Apple voucher worth ₹20,000 on annual spends of ₹20 lakh

Tata CLiQ Luxury voucher worth ₹5,000 on annual spends of ₹5 lakh

additionalBenefits: 4 complimentary movie tickets per month via BookMyShow, capped at ₹1,000 per month
16 complimentary golf rounds and 12 golf lessons per year
1 complimentary airport spa session per quarter at select airports
Complimentary premium memberships including Club Marriott, Wall Street Journal, Mint and IPV membership
1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible fuel transactions between ₹500 and ₹4,000, capped at ₹250 per month

salaried: Audited income verification or relationship status checks apply
